spl_product_data_elements: Whisidom Saline Solution Sodium Chloride 0.9% Saline Solution SODIUM CHLORIDE CHLORIDE ION WATER
warnings: Warnings ·NOT FOR IN JECTIONS ·Only use sealed vialss. Do not use if vial is bioken or already open
do_not_use: Do not use •Do not use after expiration date •Discontinue use if you experience any adverse reaction and call your physician.
keep_out_of_reach_of_children: Keep Out Of Reach Of Children Keep out of reach of children
dosage_and_administration: Directions Hold the ampoule gently and twist the top. Squeeze the ampoule to dispense the saline. Discard after use.
